untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-period lookback for prior period returns ranking, portfolio formation based on return deciles, equal-weighting scheme application across a selected universe, size-decile benchmarking adjustments, and annual rebalancing logic. These are portfolio-construction and multi-security aggregation operations that cannot be expressed as single-bar technical indicator conditions. The signal requires custom portfolio mechanics (decile ranking, rebalancing, size adjustment) beyond the scope of the indicator-based rule engine.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_227016_3 is a fundamental/factor-based contrarian strategy requiring: (1) prior-period return ranking across universe, (2) portfolio formation at discrete dates, (3) equal-weighting and rebalancing logic, (4) size-adjusted return measurement. These operations belong in a portfolio backtester, not a per-bar indicator rule engine. A proxy entry condition (returns < 0) is provided for reference, but the full strategy cannot be captured.
